summary: Iteration 173 testing complete: Five Levels of Consciousness progression system and AI Product Generator (Tool Forge & Skill Generator). All 27 backend tests passed. All frontend UI elements verified working.
seed_data_creation: User has accumulated 175+ XP from test activities (mood_log, quest_complete, journal_entry, meditation_complete, daily_ritual, boss_defeat)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 173 features fully working. User is at Level 1 (Physical) with 175+ XP, needs 500 XP for Level 2 (Emotional). Tool Forge requires Level 3 (1500 XP), Skill Generator requires Level 4 (3500 XP). All forge/create and forge/generate endpoints correctly return 403 for Level 1 users. Display mode toggle works (rank/aura/hybrid).

consciousness_levels.GET /api/consciousness/levels: Returns all 5 levels: Physical (L1, 0 XP), Emotional (L2, 500 XP), Mental (L3, 1500 XP), Intuitive (L4, 3500 XP), Pure Consciousness (L5, 7000 XP)
consciousness_levels.GET /api/consciousness/status: Returns level, level_info, xp_total, xp_into_level, xp_for_next, progress_pct, display_mode, all_levels, is_max_level
consciousness_levels.POST /api/consciousness/progress: Awards XP for activities: mood_log=10, journal_entry=15, meditation_complete=20, quest_complete=25, daily_ritual=30, boss_defeat=50
consciousness_levels.POST /api/consciousness/display-mode: Sets display mode to rank/aura/hybrid, validates input
consciousness_levels.GET /api/consciousness/gate-check/{featu: Checks if feature is unlocked at user's level, returns required_level info

tool_forge.GET /api/forge/tools/types: Returns 3 tool types (resonator_key, focus_lens, resource_harvester) with lock status based on consciousness level
tool_forge.POST /api/forge/tools/create: Requires Level 3+, costs 25 Dust, returns 403 for lower levels

skill_generator.GET /api/forge/skills/types: Returns 3 skill types (passive_buff, active_mantra, skill_bottle) with lock status
skill_generator.POST /api/forge/skills/generate: Requires Level 4+, costs 3 Credits, returns 403 for lower levels

skill_types.skill_bottle: Package mastered skills for sale, Level 5+

forge_inventory.GET /api/forge/inventory: Returns user's forged items with count
forge_inventory.POST /api/forge/list: Lists item on marketplace, returns 404 for non-existent items
forge_inventory.POST /api/forge/use: Uses/consumes item, returns 404 for non-existent items

frontend_ui.dashboard_consciousness_panel: Shows Level 1 Physical, XP bar (175/500 = 35%), level map with 5 icons, settings button
frontend_ui.display_mode_toggle: Rank/Aura/Hybrid buttons work, Hybrid selected by default
frontend_ui.consciousness_aura: Mountain icon with amber glow for Level 1 (Earth element)
frontend_ui.trade_circle_forge_tab: Forge tab visible with Tool Forge, Skill Gen, Inventory sub-tabs
frontend_ui.tool_forge_section: Shows 'Requires Level 3+ Consciousness' message for locked tools
frontend_ui.skill_generator_section: Shows 'Requires Level 4+ Consciousness' message for locked skills
frontend_ui.forge_inventory: Shows '0 items' with empty state message
